description: Color photograph from a DHS Career Expo, with no overlay graphics (text in frame is part of physical signage and banners at the event). A young man in a navy suit stands with his back partly to the camera talking to a woman behind a recruiting table; she wears a gray 'Cybersecurity Service' T-shirt. The booth is draped in a black tablecloth printed in white with 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY / CYBERSECURITY SERVICE,' and a green vertical banner behind her repeats the DHS Cybersecurity Service text. The table holds giveaway items, brochures, hand sanitizer, and a sign with a QR code; blue pipe and drape and convention-hall lighting are visible, with other attendees in the background. The image uses natural lighting with no graphic treatment.
notable_text: (physical signage only) U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY / CYBERSECURITY SERVICE
